items.title: Search for suspect in shooting of 2 Minnesota lawmakers leads to one of his vehicles in rural area
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>The man suspected of shooting two Minnesota lawmakers, killing one, remains on the loose more than 36 hours after the shootings took place. Authorities said in a news conference Sunday evening that Vance Boelter was not in custody. They believe he is still alive. (AP Video: Obed Lamy)

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home</article>

items.title: Sirens in Tel Aviv as Iran missiles launched towards Israel
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Air raid sirens sounded in Tel Aviv and across Israel late Sunday, sending residents to seek shelter as Iranian missiles were launched towards the country. It comes as the two adversaries traded strikes for a third day since Israel launched a surprise bombardment on Iran's military and nuclear facilities.

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home</article>

items.title: Soup kitchen distributes meals to Palestinians in Gaza City amid Israel blockade
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>A soup kitchen distributed food in a Gaza City tent camp on Saturday as Palestinians struggle to get meals amid Israel's ongoing blockade and military operation. Palestinians across the Gaza Strip have become increasingly desperate as nearly three months of Israeli border closures have pushed the territory to the brink of famine.

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home</article>

items.title: Aftermath of Iran strikes in Tamra, Israel
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>A bulldozer dug through debris Sunday near a home in the Arab Israeli city of Tamra. The home’s third floor was pancaked and nearby buildings were also damaged. Four people, including a 13-year-old, were killed in the strike.

Aftermath of Iran strikes in Tamra, Israel

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home</article>

items.title: Aftermath of Iran missile attack in Tel Aviv area in Israel
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Tehran unleashed a fresh barrage of missiles, Sunday, resulting in the deaths of four people in Israel. Buildings and cars were severely damaged in Bat Yam, near Tel Aviv.  Meanwhile Israel launched an expanded assault on Iran, with direct strikes targeting its energy industry and Defense Ministry headquarters.

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home</article>

items.title: Israel and Iran trade strikes for a third day as nuclear talks are called off
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Israel unleashed airstrikes across Iran for a third day on Sunday and threatened even greater force as some Iranian missiles evaded Israeli air defenses to strike buildings in the heart of the country.

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home</article>

items.title: In White Sox stadium broadcast, Pope Leo XIV sends message of hope to Chicago and the US
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>In his first words directed specifically to Americans, Pope Leo XIV told young people on Saturday how to find hope and meaning in their lives through God and in service to others.

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home</article>

items.title: Aftermath of Iran strike on Bat Yam near Tel Aviv in Israel
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Daylight on Sunday revealed the massive destruction caused by Iranian missiles in the Israeli city of Bat Yam, near Tel Aviv. Destroyed buildings and ruined cars littered the streets. 

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home</article>

items.title: Los Angeles police use tear gas to disperse 'No Kings' protesters
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Police in Los Angeles, where protests over federal immigration enforcement raids erupted a week earlier and sparked demonstrations across the country, used tear gas and crowd-control munitions to clear out protesters on Saturday. (AP video: Mark Vancleave).

#losangeles #protest #news

items.title: Israeli hospital moves some patients into underground facility amid Iran escalation
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Eliran Bar, the father of a three-week-old premature baby who was moved to the underground facility at the Sheba Medical Center in Israel in anticipation of Iranian retaliatory attacks., has said his baby is doing well.

#israel #iran #news 

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

items.title: LIVE: Aftermath of Iran's retaliatory attack on Tel Aviv area
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Watch a live view of the aftermath of Iranian attacks on Bat Yam, near Tel Aviv. Iran launched a second round of missiles against Israel as Israel’s military kept up attacks in Iran following earlier strikes that targeted nuclear and military sites. Read more here: https://bit.ly/3FG1Gg9

#israel #iran #live</article>

items.title: LIVE: Aftermath of Iran’s retaliatory missile attack on Israel
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Watch a live view from Tamra in northern Israel showing the aftermath of Iranian attacks. Iran launched a second round of missiles against Israel as Israel’s military kept up attacks in Iran following earlier strikes that targeted nuclear and military sites. Read more here: https://bit.ly/3FG1Gg9

#israel #iran #live</article>

items.title: LIVE: Jerusalem skyline after Iran's retaliatory attack on Israel
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Live from Jerusalem after Iran launched retaliatory missile and drone strikes on Israel into Saturday morning, killing at least three people and wounding dozens. It comes following a series of deadly Israeli attacks on Iran’s nuclear program and its armed forces.

#iran #israel #jerusalem</article>

items.title: LIVE: Jerusalem skyline after Iran's retaliatory missile attack on Israel
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Live from Jerusalem after Iran launched a second round of missiles against Israel as Israel’s military kept up attacks in Iran following earlier strikes that targeted nuclear and military sites. Read more here: https://bit.ly/3FG1Gg9

items.title: Iran missiles seen in skies over Jerusalem and Tel Aviv in Israel
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Missiles and projectiles were seen in the skies over Jerusalem and Tel Aviv early on Sunday as Tehran unleashed a fresh attack on Israel which in turn launched an expanded assault on Iran. Israel warned of more attacks after Tehran fired waves of missiles and drones that killed three people and wounded dozens in Israel.

#israel #iran #news
